title: Fish Scaler Stainless Steel, Premium Fish Scale Remover Integrated Casting, Heavy Duty Wedge-Shaped Sawtooth Fish Descaler Tool, Ergonomic Handle Fish Scaler Remover No Mess, Fish Scaler Tool
features: 【🎁Present Packing】Premium fish scaler tool with a decent package is an ideal gift 💝 for all people who love kitchen life.

【Larger Coverage 24 Sawteeth with Cover】SUCCFLY fish scale remover tool has 24 wedge-shaped sawtooth nails, larger coverage, ensure even and thorough scale removal, unlike simple two blade fish descaler with pointed sawteeth, will not scratch fish skin or hurt your hands, safely and efficiently. The cover integrated with grooves help to capture loose scales without splashing everywhere.

【Top Stainless Steel Fish Scaler】The fish cleaner scaler is made of food grade 304 stainless steel, rust proof, corrosion-resistant, sturdy and virtually unbreakable. Premium fish scaler brush -- An exquisite kitchen tool will make you love the kitchen life more.

【Ergonomic Angle Handle & Easy to Clean】The fish scales remover with 30-degree ergonomic angle thickened handle, make the fish scaling tool easier to gripped. No need to bend your wrist, comfortable and safe. The fish scale scraper is integrated precision casting and mirror polish, no gap, no dirt, super easy to clean and dishwasher safety, unlike the wood handles.

【Multi-Purpose & 5-Year Warranty】Fish Scaler is suitable for all kinds of fish, with unlimited coarse and fine scales. Portable fish cleaner suitable for family kitchen, seafood markets, fishing, outdoor, etc. Each fish scaler comes with a 5-year warranty. If any questions, please feel free to contact us,your satisfaction is paramount!

Premium fish scaler tool, suitable for all fish with coarse or fine scales, including snapper, rockfish, salmon, sea bass, sardine, black cod, trout,etc. Continuously comparing and improving with others'.
